_doc:
List of famous traders to add as figures. Each entry needs:
  - slug: kebab-case unique id
  - display_name: how it shows on the page
  - twitter_handle: their X handle (no @)
  - identifier: either an ENS name (foo.eth) OR a 0x... address OR a Solana base58 address
  - description: 1-2 sentences
  - category: one of person | company | government | protocol | celebrity

The verifier script (scripts/verify-and-sync-traders.mjs) will:
  1. Resolve each ENS name on-chain via Cloudflare's public Ethereum gateway
  2. SKIP entries that don't resolve (cannot be verified)
  3. Upsert verified entries into curated_entities

ADD MORE ENTRIES HERE — the script handles the rest.

traders.description: Pseudonymous DeFi whale. Large early holder of LOOKS, RPL and DAO governance tokens.
